testcase.classname: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets returns an empty list initially
testcase.name: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets returns an empty list initially

testcase.classname: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets returns only available pets by default
testcase.name: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets returns only available pets by default

testcase.classname: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets/search can filter by species
testcase.name: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets/search can filter by species

testcase.classname: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets/:id returns 404 for a missing pet
testcase.name: Public pets endpoints GET /api/pets/:id returns 404 for a missing pet

testcase.classname: Auth /current and /logout rejects /api/auth/current without token
testcase.name: Auth /current and /logout rejects /api/auth/current without token

testcase.classname: Auth /current and /logout returns current user with a valid token
testcase.name: Auth /current and /logout returns current user with a valid token

testcase.classname: Auth /current and /logout allows logout with a valid token
testcase.name: Auth /current and /logout allows logout with a valid token

testcase.classname: Partner API (x-api-key) rejects partner products without API key
testcase.name: Partner API (x-api-key) rejects partner products without API key

testcase.classname: Partner API (x-api-key) allows partner products with valid API key
testcase.name: Partner API (x-api-key) allows partner products with valid API key

testcase.classname: Partner API (x-api-key) allows partner pets with valid API key
testcase.name: Partner API (x-api-key) allows partner pets with valid API key

testcase.classname: Public products endpoints GET /api/products returns an empty list initially
testcase.name: Public products endpoints GET /api/products returns an empty list initially

testcase.classname: Public products endpoints GET /api/products returns seeded products
testcase.name: Public products endpoints GET /api/products returns seeded products

testcase.classname: Public products endpoints GET /api/products/:id returns 404 for a missing product
testcase.name: Public products endpoints GET /api/products/:id returns 404 for a missing product

testcase.classname: Public products endpoints GET /api/products/:id returns product details (with reviews array)
testcase.name: Public products endpoints GET /api/products/:id returns product details (with reviews array)

testcase.classname: Appointment slot blocking prevents double-booking the same vet/date/timeSlot
testcase.name: Appointment slot blocking prevents double-booking the same vet/date/timeSlot

testcase.classname: GET /api/health returns ok
testcase.name: GET /api/health returns ok

testcase.classname: Auth flow registers a customer and returns a token
testcase.name: Auth flow registers a customer and returns a token

testcase.classname: Auth flow logs in a customer and returns a token
testcase.name: Auth flow logs in a customer and returns a token

testcase.classname: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/veterinaries returns empty list initially
testcase.name: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/veterinaries returns empty list initially

testcase.classname: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/veterinaries returns approved vets
testcase.name: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/veterinaries returns approved vets

testcase.classname: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots rejects missing parameters
testcase.name: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots rejects missing parameters

testcase.classname: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots returns slots for a vet
testcase.name: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots returns slots for a vet

testcase.classname: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots returns 404 for unknown vet
testcase.name: Public appointments endpoints GET /api/appointments/available-slots returns 404 for unknown vet
